title: Feature: Add support for L40 FusedMoE in cutlass path
author: amirkl94
body: Adds an Ada Lovelace L40 (sm89) FusedMoE path in the CUTLASS backend. The L40 lacks the Hopper TMA/wgmma path, so this dispatches to an sm_89 CUTLASS GEMM configuration with FP8 (E4M3) tensor-core MMA tuned for Ada's 4th-gen Tensor Cores. Adds a compute-capability 8.9 dispatch branch.
diff:
+// L40 / sm89 FusedMoE: Ada FP8 tensor-core path
+#if defined(CUTLASS_ARCH_MMA_SM89_SUPPORTED)
+  using ArchTag = cutlass::arch::Sm89;
+  // FP8 E4M3 MMA for Ada Lovelace
+#endif
